Code fragment: public final TableField<PostsRecord, UUID> ID = createField("id", org.jooq.impl.SQLDataType.UUID.nullable(false).defaultValue(org.jooq.impl.DSL.field("uuid_generate_v4()", org.jooq.impl.SQLDataType.UUID)), this, "");
Explanation: The primary key column is generically named 'id' instead of a more descriptive name like 'post_id'. Consider renaming the column to 'post_id' to make it clearer which table it belongs to, especially when used in joins or as a foreign key in other tables.

Using selectFrom(POSTS) fetches all columns from the POSTS table, which may retrieve unnecessary data and reduce performance. Consider using select() with explicit column names like jooq.select(POSTS.ID, POSTS.SUBJECT, POSTS.AUTHOR, POSTS.CONTENT).from(POSTS).
